service.name: YouTube Music
service.description: YouTube Music — sub-service of youtube.com. Terms governed by parent Terms of Service.

api_access.conditions: YouTube Data API v3 available with 10,000 quota units/day free. Additional quota requires request. OAuth required for user data.

scrape_data.conditions: Automated scraping of YouTube content is prohibited. Use YouTube Data API v3 for programmatic access.

allow_training.conditions: YouTube content may not be used to train AI models without explicit written authorization from Google/YouTube.
